title: Calendar for Auction of Government of India Treasury Bills
description: (For the Quarter ending June 2026) Reserve Bank of India, in consultation with the Government of India, hereby, notifies the calendar for issuance of Treasury Bills for the quarter ending June 2026 as under: Notified Amount for Auction of Treasury Bills (April - June, 2026) (₹ crore) Date of Auction Date of Issue 91 Days 182 Days 364 Days Total April 08, 2026 April 09, 2026 12,000 6,000 6,000 24,000 April 15, 2026 April 16, 2026 12,000 6,000 6,000 24,000 April 22, 2026 April 23, 2026 12,00
